_meta.description: Quiz for State Processor API lesson

questions.question: Какой savepoint format ОБЯЗАТЕЛЕН для State Processor API?

options.text: Canonical — backend-agnostic, поддерживается State Processor API. Native (backend-specific binary) НЕ поддерживается

questions.explanation: State Processor API работает только с canonical savepoint format. Canonical — universal serialization, не привязан к конкретному backend (RocksDB, ForSt, HashMap). State Processor API reader может deserialize state regardless of original backend. Native format — backend-specific binary (RocksDB SST file references) — не доступен для batch processing. Triggering: `flink stop --type canonical`. Если у вас native savepoint и нужен State Processor API — нужно re-savepoint canonical first.
questions.studyHint: Повторите урок — State types которые поддерживаются + Production gotchas

questions.question: ValueState<UserProfile> на 10M users, добавить новое поле tenantId с дефолтным 'default'. Какой подход?

options.text: Просто добавить поле — POJO evolution auto-handles
Stop с canonical savepoint → State Processor API: read old state, map (add tenantId='default'), write new savepoint с new UserProfile class → restart streaming с new savepoint
Запустить SQL query для bulk update

questions.explanation: POJO evolution add nullable field — auto-handled. Но если хотим установить специфический default ('default' не null) для всех existing users → нужен manual migration. Workflow: (1) Stop с canonical savepoint (обязательно); (2) State Processor API batch job: SavepointReader.read() → readKeyedState → map к Tuple<key, oldState> → transform set tenantId='default' → BootstrapTransformation → SavepointWriter.fromExistingSavepoint().removeOperator(old).withOperator(new).write(); (3) Update streaming code с new UserProfile class; (4) Restart streaming с new savepoint; (5) Keep old savepoint минимум неделю.
questions.studyHint: Повторите урок — Migrate state schema: incompatible change

questions.question: Job stateful UID 'fraud-detector'. State Processor API job ищет 'fraud-detector' но возвращает empty results. Что случилось?

options.text: OperatorIdentifier.forUid('fraud-detector') не match с UID в streaming code. Возможно typo, или streaming не set UID (auto-generated ID). State Processor API matches strictly by UID — empty results silent

questions.explanation: Silent empty results — частая State Processor API ловушка. Causes: (1) UID typo в State Processor batch job vs streaming code; (2) Streaming не set UID явно (auto-generated), State Processor не находит; (3) Operator removed между savepoint и State Processor API access; (4) Savepoint corrupt — но это обычно throws exception. Prevention: enforce `pipeline.auto-generate-uids: false` в streaming, code review UID stability, unit test State Processor jobs с production savepoint sample. State descriptor name + type также должны точно match (e.g., name 'user-state' vs 'user-state-v2').

questions.question: State Processor API позволяет читать и писать savepoint state offline через стандартный DataStream batch API — это distributed batch processing, scales linear на cluster.
questions.explanation: True. State Processor API — это polnoценный distributed batch processing. SavepointReader.read() open savepoint как 'таблицу', readKeyedState/readListState/readBroadcastState возвращают DataStream. Стандартные map/filter/keyBy/aggregate operations работают. Distributed — TM-ы parallel read разные key groups. Для 1TB state нужно много slot-ов + DFS bandwidth. SavepointWriter.fromExistingSavepoint() или newSavepoint() create новый savepoint от batch data. Use cases: analytics on state, bootstrap, schema migration, operator removal, maxParallelism change.
